questions.prompt: Which service helps migrate databases to AWS with minimal downtime?
questions.explanation: Database Migration Service migrates databases efficiently.

questions.prompt: Which service helps migrate large datasets using physical devices?
questions.explanation: AWS Snowball is a physical device for data transfer.

questions.prompt: Which service automates data transfer between on-premises and AWS?
questions.explanation: AWS DataSync automates data transfer at scale.

questions.prompt: Which service provides a landing zone for multi-account AWS environments?
questions.explanation: AWS Control Tower sets up a secure multi-account environment.

questions.prompt: Which service helps migrate virtual machines to AWS?
questions.explanation: AWS Application Migration Service migrates VMs to AWS.

questions.prompt: Which service provides hybrid cloud storage integration?
questions.explanation: AWS Storage Gateway integrates on-premises with AWS storage.

questions.prompt: Which service provides a consistent hybrid cloud experience with VMware?
questions.explanation: VMware Cloud on AWS integrates VMware with AWS infrastructure.

questions.prompt: Which service brings AWS infrastructure and services on-premises?
questions.explanation: AWS Outposts extends AWS services to on-premises.

questions.prompt: Which service helps migrate applications with minimal code changes?
questions.explanation: Elastic Beanstalk simplifies application deployment and migration.

questions.prompt: Which service provides guidance and tools for cloud migration projects?
questions.explanation: AWS Migration Hub centralizes migration tracking and guidance.
